task_yaml.task:
I dropped a small vendor receipt packet here:

    /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/receipt_packet/

Please inspect the receipt images with the desktop file manager and a
real image or PDF viewer. The packet was copied from a shared drive,
so watch for repeated scans or near-duplicate files that should not be
counted twice.

Create a LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/receipt_packet_audit.ods

The spreadsheet should have one row per source file with these fields:
source file, accepted/excluded, duplicate-of if any, item count,
merchant or short receipt label if visible, category, total amount,
and notes. Also include a summary section with accepted receipt count,
excluded duplicate count, and final approved total across unique
receipts.

Then use LibreOffice Writer to write a short audit memo at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/receipt_packet_memo.odt

Also export or save a plain text copy at:

    /tmp_workspace/results/receipt_packet_memo.txt

Save screenshots under `/tmp_workspace/results/gui_evidence/` showing:
the source folder or opened receipt image, the Calc spreadsheet, and
the Writer memo. Please use the real GUI apps for review and final
screenshots; a script-only spreadsheet/memo is not enough.
